description: Structural evolutionary validation contract for ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json. Const retained only for permanent invariants. Phase names, status strings, and mutable flags use type/enum/required constraints. Markdown files are derived mirrors only.
schema_3_13_change_summary: Expanded phase_id/current_phase_id/previous_phase_id pattern to two-or-three-segment. Added schema_version 3.13. Reconciled completed_phases to accept both array and object formats. Triggered by state reconciliation packet base SHA e747ee5.
schema_3_14_change_summary: PURG04 post-merge validation packet: permit the live state to advance from PURG04_TRACK_A_MAIN_MERGE_EXECUTION to PURG04_TRACK_A_POST_MERGE_VALIDATION_PACKET, enforce the operator authorization plus no-real-execution packet artifacts, and allow next_phase/active_next_phase/deferred_phase to become null when the Próxima fase defines no successor.
schema_3_15_change_summary: Residual risk carry-forward route opening: admit PURG_RESIDUAL_RISK_CARRY_FORWARD_PACKET as the live artifact-only route through an explicit operator route-opening packet, add validator enforcement for the residual candidate chain and new artifacts, materialize the PURG04 post-merge validation successor row in the active Próxima fase, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because the new residual route has no successor row.
schema_3_16_change_summary: INF revalidation route activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ROUTE_ADMISSION_PACKET from the TRACK_REVALIDATION_FIRST candidate into the live active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_route_admission as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus route-admission artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened INF route.
schema_3_17_change_summary: INF revalidation readiness activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_READINESS_PACKET from the live route-admission candidate into the active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_readiness as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus readiness artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened readiness route.
schema_3_19_change_summary: INF revalidation execution: admit INF_REVALIDATION_EXECUTION_PACKET as the live controlled execution gate, add infernus_revalidation_execution as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the execution artifact family plus deterministic oracle evidence, materialize the operator-authorization successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because adjudication remains candidate-only after execution.
schema_3_20_change_summary: INF revalidation adjudication and closure: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ADJUDICATION_OR_CLOSURE_PACKET into the live documentary closure route, add infernus_revalidation_adjudication_or_closure as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the adjudication artifact family plus closure decision evidence, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active after canonical closure.
schema_3_21_change_summary: BENCHUIX schema tracking repair: admit a non-executable benchuix_track top-level block so the BenchUIX roadmap candidate can be tracked in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json without altering the live route, while enforcing trilha_lock_active=true and every BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flag as false.
schema_3_22_change_summary: BENCHUIX tracking generalization: replace single-phase consts in benchuix_track with bounded enums for BENCHUIX-00 through BENCHUIX-27 and CRISOL, preserving non-executable tracking, trilha_lock_active=true, and all BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flags as false.
schema_3_23_change_summary: BENCHUIX standing authorization materialization: record the operator standing authorization for candidate-only BENCHUIX transitions from BENCHUIX-08 through CRISOL, require a standing authorization artifact family plus validator enforcement, and preserve every real execution/product/runtime/secret/billing/OAuth/customer-data lock as false.
schema_3_24_change_summary: Naming clarity metadata: permit an optional top-level display_name in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json so the live phase can carry a human-readable alias without changing phase_id/current_phase_id/next_phase/active_next_phase or any real lock.
schema_3_25_change_summary: BENCHUIX evidence tracking enrichment: record independently reverified draft_v5 ajuda and cleanup commit/run evidence inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
schema_3_26_change_summary: BENCHUIX runtime fix evidence tracking: record the independently reverified draft_v5 runtime-fix commit and CI run inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
schema_3_37_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 3 execution-by-slices planning closure: add phase 3 completion attestation fields, source-sha lineage, and artifact lists for the candidate-only slice plan/review packet while keeping next_phase null and preserving no real runtime execution.
schema_3_38_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 4 canonization closure: add phase 4 completion attestation fields and artifact lists for the candidate-only canonization packet while keeping the current route closed, preserving the historical review packet, and maintaining no real runtime execution.

last_phase.description: derived read-only view, computed from previous_phase_id/phase_id/next_phase — never edit manually

next_phase_simple.description: derived read-only view, computed from previous_phase_id/phase_id/next_phase — never edit manually

phase_now.description: derived read-only view, computed from previous_phase_id/phase_id/next_phase — never edit manually

governance_gate_streak.description: Count of consecutive governance gates without a capacity gate in between. Resets to 0 on any capacity gate pass. Blocks at 3.

seen_gate_signatures.description: List of gate signatures (sha256[:16] of phase_class+locks) already executed. Repeated signature is blocked.

phase_class.description: Semantic class of the current gate. Determines circuit breaker routing (governance vs capacity).

title: ARIS Active Context Canonical Live State Schema v3.39
schema_3_18_change_summary: INF revalidation operator authorization: admit INF_REVALIDATION_OPERATOR_AUTHORIZATION_PACKET as the live post-readiness operator gate, add infernus_revalidation_operator_authorization as a valid live/next route class, require the operator-authorization artifact family, materialize the readiness successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because the new operator gate has no active successor row yet.
schema_3_27_change_summary: BENCHUIX help accordion default-closed evidence tracking: record the independently reverified draft_v5 Ajuda default-closed fix commit and CI run inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
schema_3_28_change_summary: Adds derived read-only simple-view fields (last_phase, phase_now, next_phase_simple) computed from existing canonical fields, for quick state reading without removing or duplicating source-of-truth fields.
schema_3_29_change_summary: Admits LAPIDARIUM as first-class phase_id and lapidarium_remediation as phase_class, enabling the cursor to point to the in-progress Lapidarium operation instead of remaining frozen at the closed IF09 milestone.
schema_3_30_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 remaining low-scope review: admit lapidarium_fase5_remaining_low_scope_* tracking fields for the read-only review of F5-004/F5-005/F5-006, recording REMOVE_CANDIDATE decisions with inventory corrections (F5-004/F5-005 are directories not files) and TTS resolution (F5-006 backup superseded by active src/aris/voice/tts.py), while preserving all real execution locks false and no cleanup executed.
schema_3_31_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 nested Git repository review: admit lapidarium_fase5_nested_git_review_* tracking fields for the read-only review of F5-015, recording the nested third-party Smart Connections MCP repo as a quarantined snapshot with detached HEAD/origin-main metadata, governance/test-only references in Project_ARIS, and no runtime or product dependency.
schema_3_32_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 PostScript binary review: admit lapidarium_fase5_postscript_review_* tracking fields for the read-only review of F5-013/F5-014, recording the ignored untracked ImageMagick-generated PostScript files, zero runtime references, governance-only reference hits, and blocked decision pending operator origin/intent confirmation.
schema_3_33_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 blocked residuals closure: admit lapidarium_fase5_blocked_residuals_* tracking fields for the governance-only closure packet, recording the final item-state counts, explicit future authorization requirements, no-additional-cleanup attestation, and the CLOSED_WITH_BLOCKED_RESIDUALS decision without changing any real execution lock.
schema_3_34_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 residuals safe resolution: admit lapidarium_fase5_residuals_safe_resolution_* tracking fields for the safe quarantine packet, recording the external PostScript quarantine manifest, read-only nested Git formalization, manual .env rotation packet, no-destruction attestation, and preserved no-mutation guarantees.
